<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sáe̤k]][[de:Wasser-Hund]][[hak:Ngìm-sut]][[ja:壬戌]][[ko:임술]][[vi:Nhâm Tuất]][[za:Nyaemzswt]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sut]][[zh-yue:壬戌]][[zh:壬戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sáe̤k]][[de:Wasser-Hund]][[hak:Ngìm-sut]][[ja:壬戌]][[ko:임술]][[vi:Nhâm Tuất]][[za:Nyaemzswt]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sut]][[zh-yue:壬戌]][[zh:壬戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sáe̤k]][[de:Wasser-Hund]][[hak:Ngìm-sut]][[ja:壬戌]][[ko:임술]][[vi:Nhâm Tuất]][[za:Nyaemzswt]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sut]][[zh-yue:壬戌]][[zh:壬戌]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dog|kanji=壬戌|romaji=mizunoe inu|onyomi=jinjutsu|p=rénxū|w=jen-hsü|mi=ʐən³⁵ ɕy|y=jam4 seot1|j=jam4 seot1|ci=jɐm sœt̚|mc=ɲiɪm syt|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dog also known as  Jinshitsu''' (壬戌) (みずのえいぬ、じんすいのいぬ、じんじゅつ) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 59th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding one is [[Yin Metal Rooster]] and the following one is [[Yin Water Pig]]. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ [[Mizunoe (壬)]] represents yang [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]’ [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], and they are in the relationship of [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Restraint]] (Earth overcomes Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Dog (壬戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: jinjitsu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im sul (임술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất

<!--
==
* Yang Water Dog (壬戌) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zeoi3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのえいぬ (mizunoe-inu)
***Onyomi: じんかのいぬ (jinka-no-inu)
***Onyomi: じんじゅつ (jinjutsu)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): imsuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tuất

-->
==Years of Yang Water Dog==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 2 when divided by 60 is a [[Year]] of Jinshitsu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Jinshitsu'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 2|2 AD]]
* [[AD 62|62 AD]]
* [[AD 122|122 AD]]
* [[182|182 AD]]
* [[242|242 AD]]
* [[302|302 AD]]
* [[362|362 AD]]
* [[422|422 AD]]
* [[482|482 AD]]
* [[542|542 AD]]
* [[602|602 AD]]
* [[662|662 AD]]
* [[722|722 AD]]
* [[782|782 AD]]
* [[842|842 AD]]
* [[902|902 AD]]
* [[962|962 AD]]
|
* [[1022|1022 AD]]
* [[1082|1082 AD]]
* [[1142|1142 AD]]
* [[1202|1202 AD]]
* [[1262|1262 AD]]
* [[1322|1322 AD]]
* [[1382|1382 AD]]
* [[1442|1442 AD]]
* [[1502|1502 AD]]
* [[1562|1562 AD]]
* [[1622|1622 AD]]
* [[1682|1682 AD]]
* [[1742|1742 AD]]
* [[1802|1802 AD]]
* [[1862|1862 AD]]
* [[1922|1922 AD]]
* [[1982|1982 AD]]
|
* [[2042 AD]]
* [[2100s|2102 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2162 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2222 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2282 AD]]
* [[2342 AD]]
* [[2402 AD]]
* [[2462 AD]]
* [[2522 AD]]
* [[2582 AD]]
* [[2642 AD]]
* [[2702 AD]]
* [[2762 AD]]
* [[2822 AD]]
* [[2882 AD]]
* [[2942 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Water Dog==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 3 or 8 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are [[Mizunoto (癸)]] or [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]]), then [[September]] becomes the [[Month]] of Jinshitsu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dog==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Jinshitsu is one of the intercalary days from [[Hassen]].
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Pêng-chún]]
[[zh-yue:丙子]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Water Dog|qq=ja|壬戌|version=84123859|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Bîng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Feuer-Röttvi]]
[[de:Yang Water Dog]]
[[ja:壬戌]]

[[zh:壬戌]]
[[ko:임술]]
[[fr:Chien de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Hund]]

[[af:Vuurrat (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Ratteen]]
[[en:Fire Rat]]
[[fr:Rat de feushak]]
[[it:Bing-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:병자]]
[[vi:Bính Tý]]
[[za:Bingceij]]
[[zh:丙子]]
[[ar:Yang Water Dog]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yang Water Dog--><!--Yang Water Dog-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Ìng-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Ngìm-sut]]
[[vi:Nhâm Tuất]]
[[za:Nyaemzswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sut]]
[[zh-yue:壬戌]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Ìng-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Ngìm-sut]]
[[vi:Nhâm Tuất]]
[[za:Nyaemzswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sut]]
[[zh-yue:壬戌]]
{{wikidata link|Q904937}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
